eval-discount-trap.headline: ⚡ Sources disagree: Nykaa absent, Myntra shows discount-driven demand, Meesho shows price-driven volume. No clean convergence.

conflicts.meesho_says: High volume at ₹299 with moderate rating.
conflicts.buyer_question: Is there any genuine style-driven demand, or is this purely a price play?

conflicts.cannot_prove: Cannot prove sustainable demand at healthy margins.

convergences.title: Price sensitivity across channels
convergences.detail: Both Myntra and Meesho show demand only at low prices (₹299 or 65% off). No premium signal.
convergences.proves: The style is not a premium trend; it appeals to value-conscious buyers.
convergences.cannot_prove: Cannot prove the style has no potential at moderate price points.

eval-discount-trap.upside_summary: Meesho shows strong volume at ₹299 with 8000+ units sold, indicating price-sensitive demand exists. If sourced at low cost, there may be a margin opportunity in value channels.
eval-discount-trap.catch_summary: Nykaa absence and Myntra's subsidized liquidation signal no genuine style preference. Demand is entirely price-driven, with mediocre ratings. Risk of returns and low repeat purchase.

myntra.reason: Strong presence but heavily distorted by deep discount and poor rating.

meesho.reason: High volume but low price and moderate rating; reseller growth not accelerating.

eval-mass-only.upside_summary: Meesho's 52,000+ units sold with accelerating reseller growth indicates strong viral potential in value-fashion. If you can source at a cost that allows ₹199 retail with margin, this could be a volume play.
eval-mass-only.catch_summary: Nykaa's absence and Myntra's discount dependency suggest this is a price-sensitive commodity, not a style-driven trend. Low rating on Meesho (3.4) may indicate quality issues that could lead to returns. No internal POS data to validate.

myntra.reason: Moderate presence but high discount risk and unclear driver.

meesho.reason: Strong volume and reseller growth, though rating is low.

eval-golden-convergence.headline: All sources converge: Golden Kurti shows strong, clean demand across premium and mass channels with no discount distortion

convergences.title: Strong presence across all tiers
convergences.detail: Nykaa (premium), Myntra (mass retail), and Meesho (value) all show strong presence with low discount levels, indicating genuine demand.
convergences.proves: The trend has broad appeal from premium to price-sensitive segments.
convergences.cannot_prove: Whether the demand is for the same style or different interpretations of 'golden kurti'.

convergences.title: Low discount distortion
convergences.detail: All products have low discounts (Nykaa 5%, Myntra 10%, Meesho likely minimal). No suspect or liquidation discounts detected.
convergences.cannot_prove: Whether the trend will sustain at higher price points in your store.

convergences.title: Positive ratings and velocity
convergences.detail: Nykaa 4.5★, Myntra 4.4★ with 3200 reviews and high velocity, Meesho 4.1★ with 28k+ units.
convergences.proves: Customer satisfaction is high across channels.
convergences.cannot_prove: Return rates or margin impact in your specific assortment.

eval-golden-convergence.upside_summary: Golden Kurti shows strong, clean demand across premium (Nykaa), mass retail (Myntra), and value (Meesho) channels with minimal discount distortion. Myntra's rank 2 and high review velocity indicate a style-driven trend. Meesho's reseller growth suggests emerging demand in tier-2/3/4 markets.
eval-golden-convergence.catch_summary: No internal POS data exists to validate against your own store performance. The wide price gap between Nykaa (₹1450) and Meesho (₹349) may indicate different product segments rather than a single trend. Without internal data, the bet carries uncertainty on local demand.

nykaa.reason: Strong presence, low discount, high rating, but limited product count (2).

myntra.reason: Strong presence, rank 2, high reviews, clean discount context, no noise flags.

meesho.reason: Strong presence, high volume, accelerating reseller growth, good rating.

internal.reason: No prior data available; cannot confirm or deny trend.

eval-golden-convergence.bet_rationale: All three external sources converge on strong, clean demand with low discount distortion. The trend is validated across premium and mass segments, suggesting broad appeal. Deeper buy is warranted to capture the trend in multiple stores.
eval-golden-convergence.key_uncertainty: Will the golden kurti trend perform similarly in your store's specific customer base given no prior internal data?
